rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies a major inconsistency in the blinding protocol and thoroughly addresses other issues, demonstrating end-to-end analysis.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is flagged for some assumptions but not comprehensively for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within scope, addressing all critical issues without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Constructive critique avoids introducing errors or harm, aiding in harm avoidance.
rationale.RX.5: Lack of annotated changes with sources or reasons leads to poor traceability.
